post.summary: Import customers from the ERP systems into Litium.

Build RMA based on sales order,
all articles that can be returned are included in the rma created,
and will result in a full return of all remaining items of the sales order.
Cancel remaining parts of an order
Notify Litium that order is exported to ERP.
Notify order has being delivered to end customer.

put.summary: Update the tracking information for a shipment.

post.summary: Build RMA from information in the return slip.
Set the rma state to completed.
Notify RMA has being package received.
Set the rma state to processing.

get.summary: Gets the order which is composed with RMA.

post.description: In implementation, this should send a mail to the end-customer about the return as confirmed, and refund is under processing.

post.summary: Refund the money to customer, and finish the sales return order process.

get.summary:
Gets all web hook filters that a user can register with. The filters indicate which web hook
events that this web hook will be notified for.

delete.summary: Deletes all existing web hook registrations.

get.summary: Looks up a registered web hook with the given id.

put.summary: Updates an existing web hook registration.

delete.summary: Deletes an existing web hook registration.

description.description: Gets or sets a description of the WebHook.

filters.description:
Gets the set of case-insensitive filters associated with this WebHook. The filters indicate
which WebHook events that this WebHook will be notified for.

headers.description: Gets a set of additional HTTP headers that will be sent with the WebHook request.

id.description:
Gets or sets a unique ID of the WebHook. This ID can be used to later refer to the WebHook in case it
needs to be updated or deleted. The ID is by default in the form of a System.Guid and if the field
is cleared it will be reset to a System.Guid.

isPaused.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the WebHook is paused.

properties.description:
Gets a set of additional case-insensitive properties that will be sent with the WebHook request
as part of the HTTP request entity body.

secret.description: Gets or sets the secret used to sign the body of the WebHook request.

webHookUri.description: Gets or sets the URI of the WebHook.

Litium.Application.Events.WebHooks.Reque.description:
Describes the contents and behavior or a WebHook. A Litium.Application.Events.WebHooks.RequestData is similar to a subscription in a
pub/sub system in that it allows the subscriber to indicate when and how event notifications should get
dispatched and where they should get dispatched to. A Litium.Application.Events.WebHooks.RequestData is registered and managed on a
per user basis which means that each user has a separate set of WebHooks that can get trigged by actions
executed by that user. That is, user {A} will not see a WebHook fired for an action performed by user {B}
.

Litium.Web.WebHooks.ViewModels.WebHookFi.description:
Defines a filter which can be applied when registering a WebHook. 
The filter determines which event notifications will get dispatched to a given WebHook. 
That is, depending on which filters a WebHook is created with, it will only see event 
notifications that match one or more of those filters.
